svg.title: socialIO — cursor pagination and chat list loading
svg.desc: Two diagrams: cursor-based message pagination flow, and O(1) chat list loading via denormalized last_message_id
svg.text: cursor-based message pagination — why OFFSET is wrong here

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What state does the Zustand store hold for pagination?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a conversation is first opened?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis cache serve the first load?')
sendPrompt('How does the DB query work on a cache miss?')

g.text: WHERE conversation_id = $id AND sequence_number < $cursor ORDER BY sequence_number DESC LIMIT 30

svg.text: user scrolls to top — load older messages

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the cursor value determined for the next page?')
sendPrompt('How are older messages prepended without a scroll jump?')

svg.text: chat list loading — O(1) via last_message_id denormalization

g.text: JOIN messages m ON c.last_message_id = m.id

svg.text: how last_message_id stays fresh — same DB transaction as INSERT

g.text: INSERT message (with seq) → UPDATE conversations SET last_message_id = newMsgId · both in one txn

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the chat list update in real time?')
g.text: clients re-sort chat list · move conv to top · update preview text
